_meta.description: EN-hub Bergamot catalog. Chained pivot (via EN) unblocks any pair.
_meta.notes: URLs, sizes, and sha256 values for the EN-hub pairs (en-{it,id,es,pt,de,fr} and reverse) come from the Mozilla Firefox Translations models manifest under the base URL 'https://storage.googleapis.com/moz-fx-translations-data--303e-prod-translations-data'. Sizes and hashes below are the manifest's `uncompressedSize` and `uncompressedHash` (the model binary before gzip). The runtime mirror verifies the transport bytes it serves via streaming sha256; contentDigest stays null until an operator runs `bun run verify:qvac-models` to pin the actual transport-byte digest. Consumers can use `notes.upstreamUncompressedHash` for out-of-band verification against the Mozilla manifest.

notes: QVAC on-device model registry. Fix Wave C (T3) removed three legacy pseudo-entries (bergamot-itid/iten/enid) that pointed at https://github.com/browsermt/students/releases which hosts no binaries; IT<->ID / IT<->EN / EN<->ID hops now compose the real EN-hub pairs below via the SDK's native modelConfig.pivotModel path (@qvac/sdk plugin.d.ts:206). Content digests are placeholders until the ops job mirrors the files and pins the actual sha256 (populated by modelMirrorSyncWorker on first successful mirror); consumers MUST verify digest before loading a model on-device.

models.name: OpenAI Whisper Tiny (whisper.cpp GGML)
models.notes: Registry constant WHISPER_TINY in @qvac/sdk models registry. Multilingual. Streamed via transcribeStream() with Silero VAD 5.1.2. Digest matches the SDK's sha256Checksum for this constant.

models.name: Silero VAD 5.1.2
models.notes: Pinned via registry constant VAD_SILERO_5_1_2. Passed to whisperConfigSchema.vadModelSrc. Reference config: threshold 0.6, min_speech_duration_ms 300, min_silence_duration_ms 700, max_speech_duration_s 15.0, speech_pad_ms 200 (voice-assistant docs). Digest to be pinned once verify:qvac-models is rerun.

models.name: NVIDIA Parakeet CTC 0.6B (GGML Q8_0)
models.notes: Registry constant PARAKEET_CTC_0_6B_Q8_0. Fallback English-only STT with streaming partials via parakeetStreamingConfig.chunkMs=1000. Loaded only when Whisper Tiny is unavailable or the room language is EN and RAM is tight.

models.name: Supertonic Multilingual TTS Q8_0
models.notes: Registry constant TTS_MULTILINGUAL_SUPERTONIC3_Q8_0. Loaded once per target language (config-level 'language' field, per @qvac/sdk schemas/text-to-speech.d.ts). Output is mono 16-bit PCM at 44100 Hz; wrap in a 44-byte WAV header before shipping to the renderer <audio> element. sampleRate=44100, channels=1, bitDepth=16.

models.name: SmolVLM2 500M Video-Instruct GGUF Q8_0
models.notes: Registry constant SMOLVLM2_500M_MULTIMODAL_Q8_0 (@qvac/sdk models.js:835). Backs the Cup Final match-frame captioning feature (pear-app/bare/vlmCaption.js). REQUIRES the matching projection model 'mmproj-smolvlm2-500m-multimodal-q8' loaded via modelConfig.projectionModelSrc per https://docs.qvac.tether.io/ai-capabilities/multimodal/. sha256 verified against the SDK registry entry.

models.name: SmolVLM2 500M Vision Projection Q8_0
models.notes: Registry constant MMPROJ_SMOLVLM2_500M_MULTIMODAL_Q8_0 (@qvac/sdk models.js:803). Companion vision projection for SmolVLM2 500M Q8_0. Loaded as modelConfig.projectionModelSrc alongside the LLM.

models.name: OCR Latin (EasyOCR GGUF)
models.notes: Registry constant OCR_LATIN (@qvac/sdk models.js:15277, registrySource=s3, registryPath=qvac_models_compiled/ocr/gguf/easyocr/2026-05-14/latin_g2.gguf). This model is fetched by the @qvac/sdk directly via its internal blob registry (blobCoreKey d90c026...b84ca8); pass the SDK's exported `OCR_LATIN` descriptor as modelSrc rather than the downloadUrl. Docs: https://docs.qvac.tether.io/ai-capabilities/ocr/. Used by pear-app/bare/ocr.js for jersey / scoreboard reading.

models.name: EmbeddingGemma 300M Q4_0
models.notes: Registry constant EMBEDDINGGEMMA_300M_Q4_0. Backs the RAG grounding path in pear-app/bare/rag.js: on room open the football glossary is ingested into `curva/room/<slug>/glossary`, and every chat line >6 chars is auto-ingested into `curva/room/<slug>/chat`. roomBot.answer() prepends the top-3 ragSearch() hits to the system prompt for grounded /bot replies. sha256Checksum comes from @qvac/sdk registry (dist/models/registry/models.js#EMBEDDINGGEMMA_300M_Q4_0).
